78→\\n    79→  // Insert new application\\n    80→  db.prepare(\\n    81→    \\\"INSERT INTO listing_applications (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\\\"\\n    82→  ).run(listingId, session.userId);\\n    83→\\n    84→  notifyApplicationReceived(listingId, session.displayName || \\\"Someone\\\");\\n    85→\\n    86→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\\n    87→}\\n    88→\"}]},\"uuid\":\"3cd5b5dc-7256-421f-a941-4e87cf34be81\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:25.586Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"8b64f7a3-2858-4587-9f9a-fd02fe07bf19\",\"userType\":\"external\",\"entrypoint\":\"sdk-cli\",\"cwd\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app\",\"sessionId\":\"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf\",\"version\":\"2.1.78\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"slug\":\"crispy-sparking-shell\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3cd5b5dc-7256-421f-a941-4e87cf34be81\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"agentId\":\"af8916a0d1621f3e4\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-sonnet-4-6\",\"id\":\"msg_01JdbGa56ciacLZV3UN3Q1Cm\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01NK6p3a6ngjoWtKZLbQej98\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/listings/[id]/applications/route.ts\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":1,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":4840,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":39248,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":4840,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0},\"output_tokens\":25,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CZGBS7AJPxPCigrWTvAfN\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"edf53880-c0f6-484f-9e00-77241be3ee86\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:25.933Z\",\"userType\":\"external\",\"entrypoint\":\"sdk-cli\",\"cwd\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app\",\"sessionId\":\"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf\",\"version\":\"2.1.78\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"slug\":\"crispy-sparking-shell\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"edf53880-c0f6-484f-9e00-77241be3ee86\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"agentId\":\"af8916a0d1621f3e4\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01NK6p3a6ngjoWtKZLbQej98\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01NK6p3a6ngjoWtKZLbQej98\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:25.935Z\",\"uuid\":\"979412b6-b9b5-4ba7-a4ef-3e6a016a5151\",\"userType\":\"external\",\"entrypoint\":\"sdk-cli\",\"cwd\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app\",\"sessionId\":\"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf\",\"version\":\"2.1.78\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"slug\":\"crispy-sparking-shell\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"edf53880-c0f6-484f-9e00-77241be3ee86\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"promptId\":\"63a07650-a5d2-44d8-a618-457cf36e6fb9\",\"agentId\":\"af8916a0d1621f3e4\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01NK6p3a6ngjoWtKZLbQej98\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \\\"next/server\\\";\\n     2→import db from \\\"@/lib/db\\\";\\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \\\"@/lib/session\\\";\\n     4→import { notifyApplicationDecision, notifyGroupFull } from \\\"@/lib/notifications\\\";\\n     5→\\n     6→export async function PATCH(\\n     7→  req: NextRequest,\\n     8→  { params }: { params: Promise<{ id: string }> }\\n     9→) {\\n    10→  const session = await requireAuth();\\n    11→  if (!session) {\\n    12→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \\\"Authentication required\\\" }, { status: 401 });\\n    13→  }\\n    14→\\n    15→  const { id } = await params;\\n    16→  const listingId = parseInt(id, 10);\\n    17→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \\\"Invalid listing ID\\\" }, { status: 400 });\\n    19→  }\\n    20→\\n    21→  const listing = db\\n    22→    .prepare(\\\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\\\")\\n    23→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\\n    24→\\n    25→  if (!listing) {\\n    26→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \\\"Listing not found\\\" }, { status: 404 });\\n    27→  }\\n    28→\\n    29→  if (listing.author_id !== session.userId) {\\n    30→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \\\"Only the organizer can manage applications\\\" }, { status: 403 });\\n    31→  }\\n    32→\\n    33→  const body = await req.json();\\n    34→  const { applicationId, action } = body;\\n    35→\\n    36→  if (!applicationId || ![\\\"approve\\\", \\\"reject\\\"].includes(action)) {\\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\\n    38→      { error: \\\"Invalid request. Provide applicationId and action (approve/reject).\\\" },\\n    39→      { status: 400 }\\n    40→    );\\n    41→  }\\n    42→\\n    43→  // Verify application belongs to this listing and is pending\\n    44→  const application = db\\n    45→    .prepare(\\n    46→      \\\"SELECT * FROM listing_applications WHERE id = ? AND listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\\\"\\n    47→    )\\n    48→    .get(applicationId, listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\\n    49→\\n    50→  if (!application) {\\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\\n    52→      { error: \\\"Application not found or already decided\\\" },\\n    53→      { status: 404 }\\n    54→    );\\n    55→  }\\n    56→\\n    57→  const applicantUserId = application.user_id as number;\\n    58→\\n    59→  if (action === \\\"approve\\\") {\\n    60→    // Use transaction to ensure atomicity\\n    61→    const approveTransaction = db.transaction(() => {\\n    62→      // Check if group is already full\\n    63→      const { count } = db\\n    64→        .prepare(\\\"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\\\")\\n    65→        .get(listingId) as { count: number };\\n    66→\\n    67→      if (count >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\\n    68→        throw new Error(\\\"Group is already full\\\");\\n    69→      }\\n    70→\\n    71→      // Update application status\\n    72→      db.prepare(\\n    73→        \\\"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'approved', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\\\"\\n    74→      ).run(applicationId);\\n    75→\\n    76→      // Add to members\\n    77→      db.prepare(\\n    78→        \\\"INSERT INTO listing_members (listing_id, user_id) VALUES (?, ?)\\\"\\n    79→      ).run(listingId, applicantUserId);\\n    80→\\n    81→      // Check if group is now full\\n    82→      const newCount = count + 1;\\n    83→      let rejectedApps: { id: number; user_id: number }[] = [];\\n    84→      if (newCount >= (listing.max_group_size as number)) {\\n    85→        db.prepare(\\\"UPDATE listings SET is_full = 1 WHERE id = ?\\\").run(listingId);\\n    86→\\n    87→        // Reject remaining pending applications inside the transaction\\n    88→        rejectedApps = db\\n    89→          .prepare(\\n    90→            \\\"SELECT id, user_id FROM listing_applications WHERE listing_id = ? AND status = 'pending'\\\"\\n    91→          )\\n    92→          .all(listingId) as { id: number; user_id: number }[];\\n    93→\\n    94→        for (const app of rejectedApps) {\\n    95→          db.prepare(\\n    96→            \\\"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\\\"\\n    97→          ).run(app.id);\\n    98→        }\\n    99→\\n   100→        return { isFull: true, rejectedApps };\\n   101→      }\\n   102→      return { isFull: false, rejectedApps };\\n   103→    });\\n   104→\\n   105→    try {\\n   106→      const result = approveTransaction();\\n   107→\\n   108→      // Send notifications outside the transaction (non-critical)\\n   109→      try {\\n   110→        notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \\\"approved\\\");\\n   111→\\n   112→        if (result.isFull) {\\n   113→          notifyGroupFull(listingId);\\n   114→          for (const app of result.rejectedApps) {\\n   115→            notifyApplicationDecision(app.user_id, listingId, \\\"rejected\\\");\\n   116→          }\\n   117→        }\\n   118→      } catch (notifErr) {\\n   119→        console.error(\\\"Notification error (approval succeeded):\\\", notifErr);\\n   120→      }\\n   121→\\n   122→      return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\\n   123→    } catch (err) {\\n   124→      const message = err instanceof Error ? err.message : \\\"Failed to approve\\\";\\n   125→      return NextResponse.json({ error: message }, { status: 400 });\\n   126→    }\\n   127→  } else {\\n   128→    // Reject\\n   129→    db.prepare(\\n   130→      \\\"UPDATE listing_applications SET status = 'rejected', decided_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\\\"\\n   131→    ).run(applicationId);\\n   132→\\n   133→    notifyApplicationDecision(applicantUserId, listingId, \\\"rejected\\\");\\n   134→\\n   135→    return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\\n   136→  }\\n   137→}\\n   138→\"}]},\"uuid\":\"99ef4568-c44b-4a7e-a11e-cf2d04c4bc5b\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:25.935Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"edf53880-c0f6-484f-9e00-77241be3ee86\",\"userType\":\"external\",\"entrypoint\":\"sdk-cli\",\"cwd\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app\",\"sessionId\":\"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf\",\"version\":\"2.1.78\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"slug\":\"crispy-sparking-shell\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"99ef4568-c44b-4a7e-a11e-cf2d04c4bc5b\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"agentId\":\"af8916a0d1621f3e4\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-sonnet-4-6\",\"id\":\"msg_01JdbGa56ciacLZV3UN3Q1Cm\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01FqbsBAxxfPFjU7fBgRmdaw\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/telegram/webhook/route.ts\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":\"tool_use\",\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":1,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":4840,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":39248,\"output_tokens\":191,\"server_tool_use\":{\"web_search_requests\":0,\"web_fetch_requests\":0},\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0,\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":4840},\"inference_geo\":\"\",\"iterations\":[],\"speed\":\"standard\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CZGBS7AJPxPCigrWTvAfN\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"713abcb1-f7ac-4474-ba08-62438e6594e9\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:26.419Z\",\"userType\":\"external\",\"entrypoint\":\"sdk-cli\",\"cwd\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app\",\"sessionId\":\"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf\",\"version\":\"2.1.78\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"slug\":\"crispy-sparking-shell\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"713abcb1-f7ac-4474-ba08-62438e6594e9\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"agentId\":\"af8916a0d1621f3e4\",\"type\":\"progress\",\"data\":{\"type\":\"hook_progress\",\"hookEvent\":\"PostToolUse\",\"hookName\":\"PostToolUse:Read\",\"command\":\"callback\"},\"parentToolUseID\":\"toolu_01FqbsBAxxfPFjU7fBgRmdaw\",\"toolUseID\":\"toolu_01FqbsBAxxfPFjU7fBgRmdaw\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:26.422Z\",\"uuid\":\"930134ac-484d-411c-b57e-1ee30cbeb5b7\",\"userType\":\"external\",\"entrypoint\":\"sdk-cli\",\"cwd\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app\",\"sessionId\":\"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf\",\"version\":\"2.1.78\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"slug\":\"crispy-sparking-shell\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"713abcb1-f7ac-4474-ba08-62438e6594e9\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"promptId\":\"63a07650-a5d2-44d8-a618-457cf36e6fb9\",\"agentId\":\"af8916a0d1621f3e4\",\"type\":\"user\",\"message\":{\"role\":\"user\",\"content\":[{\"tool_use_id\":\"toolu_01FqbsBAxxfPFjU7fBgRmdaw\",\"type\":\"tool_result\",\"content\":\"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \\\"next/server\\\";\\n     2→import db from \\\"@/lib/db\\\";\\n     3→import {\\n     4→  createChatInviteLink,\\n     5→  exportChatInviteLink,\\n     6→  sendMessage,\\n     7→  parseListingIdFromPayload,\\n     8→} from \\\"@/lib/telegram\\\";\\n     9→import { createNotification } from \\\"@/lib/notifications\\\";\\n    10→\\n    11→/**\\n    12→ * Telegram webhook endpoint.\\n    13→ *\\n    14→ * Handles two types of updates:\\n    15→ *\\n    16→ * 1. `my_chat_member` — bot was added to a group\\n    17→ *    When the author creates a group via the deep link, the bot is\\n    18→ *    automatically added. We detect this, generate an invite link,\\n    19→ *    and save it to the listing.\\n    20→ *\\n    21→ * 2. `message` with `/start listing_ID` — the bot receives a start\\n    22→ *    command in a group with a payload referencing a listing.\\n    23→ */\\n    24→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\\n    25→  // Verify webhook secret — fail closed if not configured\\n    26→  const webhookSecret = process.env.TELEGRAM_WEBHOOK_SECRET;\\n    27→  if (!webhookSecret) {\\n    28→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \\\"Webhook not configured\\\" }, { status: 500 });\\n    29→  }\\n    30→  const headerSecret = req.headers.get(\\\"X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token\\\");\\n    31→  if (headerSecret !== webhookSecret) {\\n    32→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \\\"Unauthorized\\\" }, { status: 403 });\\n    33→  }\\n    34→\\n    35→  let update: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    36→  try {\\n    37→    update = await req.json();\\n    38→  } catch {\\n    39→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \\\"Invalid JSON\\\" }, { status: 400 });\\n    40→  }\\n    41→\\n    42→  // Handle bot being added to a group chat\\n    43→  if (update.my_chat_member) {\\n    44→    await handleChatMemberUpdate(\\n    45→      update.my_chat_member as ChatMemberUpdate\\n    46→    );\\n    47→  }\\n    48→\\n    49→  // Handle /start command in groups (fallback mechanism)\\n    50→  if (update.message) {\\n    51→    await handleMessage(update.message as TelegramMessage);\\n    52→  }\\n    53→\\n    54→  // Always return 200 to Telegram to avoid retries\\n    55→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\\n    56→}\\n    57→\\n    58→interface ChatMemberUpdate {\\n    59→  chat: {\\n    60→    id: number;\\n    61→    title?: string;\\n    62→    type: string;\\n    63→  };\\n    64→  from: {\\n    65→    id: number;\\n    66→    first_name: string;\\n    67→  };\\n    68→  new_chat_member: {\\n    69→    user: {\\n    70→      id: number;\\n    71→      is_bot: boolean;\\n    72→    };\\n    73→    status: string;\\n    74→  };\\n    75→}\\n    76→\\n    77→interface TelegramMessage {\\n    78→  chat: {\\n    79→    id: number;\\n    80→    type: string;\\n    81→    title?: string;\\n    82→  };\\n    83→  text?: string;\\n    84→  from?: {\\n    85→    id: number;\\n    86→  };\\n    87→}\\n    88→\\n    89→/**\\n    90→ * When the bot is added to a group, check if it's related to a listing.\\n    91→ *\\n    92→ * The deep link format is: t.me/BOT?startgroup=listing_ID\\n    93→ * When a user creates a group through this link, Telegram:\\n    94→ * 1. Creates the group\\n    95→ * 2. Adds the bot as a member\\n    96→ * 3. Sends a `my_chat_member` update\\n    97→ *\\n    98→ * We use the group title or a pending mapping to associate the chat with a listing.\\n    99→ */\\n   100→async function handleChatMemberUpdate(update: ChatMemberUpdate) {\\n   101→  const { chat, new_chat_member } = update;\\n   102→\\n   103→  // Only process when bot is added (member or administrator)\\n   104→  if (\\n   105→    !new_chat_member.user.is_bot ||\\n   106→    ![\\\"member\\\", \\\"administrator\\\"].includes(new_chat_member.status)\\n   107→  ) {\\n   108→    return;\\n   109→  }\\n   110→\\n   111→  // Only process group chats\\n   112→  if (![\\\"group\\\", \\\"supergroup\\\"].includes(chat.type)) {\\n   113→    return;\\n   114→  }\\n   115→\\n   116→  // Try to find the listing this group belongs to.\\n   117→  // Strategy 1: Check pending_telegram_groups mapping table\\n   118→  const pending = db\\n   119→    .prepare(\\n   120→      \\\"SELECT listing_id FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\\\"\\n   121→    )\\n   122→    .get(chat.id) as { listing_id: number } | undefined;\\n   123→\\n   124→  if (pending) {\\n   125→    await linkTelegramToListing(pending.listing_id, chat.id);\\n   126→    db.prepare(\\\"DELETE FROM pending_telegram_groups WHERE telegram_chat_id = ?\\\").run(\\n   127→      chat.id\\n   128→    );\\n   129→    return;\\n   130→  }\\n   131→\\n   132→  // Strategy 2: Check for listings awaiting auto-telegram (most recent unlinked full listing by this author)\\n   133→  // We store the chat ID and wait for the /start command or title match\\n   134→  // For now, store the mapping and send a welcome message\\n   135→  await sendMessage(\\n   136→    chat.id,\\n   137→    \\\"Hello! I'm the Bookmate bot. I'll help set up this reading group.\\\\n\\\\n\\\" +\\n   138→      'If this group was created for a Bookmate listing, I\\\\'ll automatically generate an invite link. ' +\\n   139→      \\\"The organizer can also type <code>/link</code> to manually trigger the setup.\\\"\\n   140→  );\\n   141→\\n   142→  // Store the chat for potential later linking\\n   143→  try {\\n   144→    db.prepare(\\n   145→      \\\"INSERT OR IGNORE INTO telegram_chats (chat_id, chat_title, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, datetime('now'))\\\"\\n   146→    ).run(chat.id, chat.title || \\\"\\\");\\n   147→  } catch {\\n   148→    // Table might not exist yet on first run — handled gracefully\\n   149→  }\\n   150→}\\n   151→\\n   152→/**\\n   153→ * Handle messages in group chats.\\n   154→ * Supports /start with payload and /link command.\\n   155→ */\\n   156→async function handleMessage(message: TelegramMessage) {\\n   157→  if (!message.text || ![\\\"group\\\", \\\"supergroup\\\"].includes(message.chat.type)) {\\n   158→    return;\\n   159→  }\\n   160→\\n   161→  const text = message.text.trim();\\n   162→\\n   163→  // Handle /start with listing payload (sent when group is created via deep link)\\n   164→  if (text.startsWith(\\\"/start \\\")) {\\n   165→    const payload = text.replace(\\\"/start \\\", \\\"\\\").trim();\\n   166→    const listingId = parseListingIdFromPayload(payload);\\n   167→    if (listingId) {\\n   168→      await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\\n   169→      return;\\n   170→    }\\n   171→  }\\n   172→\\n   173→  // Handle /link command — allow manual linking\\n   174→  // Security: only show listings authored by a Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\\n   175→  if (text === \\\"/link\\\") {\\n   176→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\\n   177→    if (!telegramUserId) {\\n   178→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \\\"Could not identify the sender.\\\");\\n   179→      return;\\n   180→    }\\n   181→\\n   182→    // Look up the Bookmate user linked to this Telegram user\\n   183→    const linkedUser = db\\n   184→      .prepare(\\\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\\\")\\n   185→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\\n   186→\\n   187→    if (!linkedUser) {\\n   188→      await sendMessage(\\n   189→        message.chat.id,\\n   190→        \\\"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account. \\\" +\\n   191→          \\\"Please use the Telegram setup link from your Bookmate listing page to link your account first.\\\"\\n   192→      );\\n   193→      return;\\n   194→    }\\n   195→\\n   196→    // Only show unlinked listings authored by this verified user\\n   197→    const unlinkedListings = db\\n   198→      .prepare(\\n   199→        `SELECT id, book_title FROM listings\\n   200→         WHERE is_full = 1 AND (telegram_link = '' OR telegram_link IS NULL)\\n   201→         AND telegram_chat_id IS NULL\\n   202→         AND author_id = ?\\n   203→         ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5`\\n   204→      )\\n   205→      .all(linkedUser.user_id) as { id: number; book_title: string }[];\\n   206→\\n   207→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 0) {\\n   208→      await sendMessage(\\n   209→        message.chat.id,\\n   210→        \\\"No unlinked reading groups found for your account. The group may already be set up!\\\"\\n   211→      );\\n   212→      return;\\n   213→    }\\n   214→\\n   215→    if (unlinkedListings.length === 1) {\\n   216→      await linkTelegramToListing(unlinkedListings[0].id, message.chat.id);\\n   217→      return;\\n   218→    }\\n   219→\\n   220→    const listText = unlinkedListings\\n   221→      .map((l) => `  /link_${l.id} — \\\"${l.book_title}\\\"`)\\n   222→      .join(\\\"\\\\n\\\");\\n   223→    await sendMessage(\\n   224→      message.chat.id,\\n   225→      `Multiple reading groups need a Telegram link. Pick one:\\\\n\\\\n${listText}`\\n   226→    );\\n   227→    return;\\n   228→  }\\n   229→\\n   230→  // Handle /link_ID command — require verified ownership\\n   231→  const linkMatch = text.match(/^\\\\/link_(\\\\d+)$/);\\n   232→  if (linkMatch) {\\n   233→    const telegramUserId = message.from?.id;\\n   234→    if (!telegramUserId) {\\n   235→      await sendMessage(message.chat.id, \\\"Could not identify the sender.\\\");\\n   236→      return;\\n   237→    }\\n   238→\\n   239→    const linkedUser = db\\n   240→      .prepare(\\\"SELECT user_id FROM telegram_user_links WHERE telegram_user_id = ?\\\")\\n   241→      .get(telegramUserId) as { user_id: number } | undefined;\\n   242→\\n   243→    if (!linkedUser) {\\n   244→      await sendMessage(\\n   245→        message.chat.id,\\n   246→        \\\"Your Telegram account is not linked to a Bookmate account.\\\"\\n   247→      );\\n   248→      return;\\n   249→    }\\n   250→\\n   251→    const listingId = parseInt(linkMatch[1], 10);\\n   252→\\n   253→    // Verify this user is the listing author\\n   254→    const listing = db\\n   255→      .prepare(\\\"SELECT author_id FROM listings WHERE id = ?\\\")\\n   256→      .get(listingId) as { author_id: number } | undefined;\\n   257→\\n   258→    if (!listing || listing.author_id !== linkedUser.user_id) {\\n   259→      await sendMessage(\\n   260→        message.chat.id,\\n   261→        \\\"You can only link Telegram groups to your own Bookmate listings.\\\"\\n   262→      );\\n   263→      return;\\n   264→    }\\n   265→\\n   266→    await linkTelegramToListing(listingId, message.chat.id);\\n   267→  }\\n   268→}\\n   269→\\n   270→/**\\n   271→ * Link a Telegram chat to a listing:\\n   272→ * 1. Generate an invite link\\n   273→ * 2. Save it to the listing\\n   274→ * 3. Notify all members\\n   275→ * 4. Send a confirmation message to the Telegram group\\n   276→ */\\n   277→async function linkTelegramToListing(listingId: number, chatId: number) {\\n   278→  const listing = db\\n   279→    .prepare(\\\"SELECT * FROM listings WHERE id = ?\\\")\\n   280→    .get(listingId) as Record<string, unknown> | undefined;\\n   281→\\n   282→  if (!listing) {\\n   283→    await sendMessage(chatId, \\\"Could not find that reading group on Bookmate.\\\");\\n   284→    return;\\n   285→  }\\n   286→\\n   287→  if (listing.telegram_link) {\\n   288→    await sendMessage(chatId, \\\"This reading group already has a Telegram link set up!\\\");\\n   289→    return;\\n   290→  }\\n   291→\\n   292→  // Try to create an invite link\\n   293→  let inviteLink = await createChatInviteLink(chatId);\\n   294→  if (!inviteLink) {\\n   295→    // Fallback: export the default invite link\\n   296→    inviteLink = await exportChatInviteLink(chatId);\\n   297→  }\\n   298→\\n   299→  if (!inviteLink) {\\n   300→    await sendMessage(\\n   301→      chatId,\\n   302→      \\\"I couldn't generate an invite link. Please make sure I have admin permissions in this group, \\\" +\\n   303→        \\\"then try again with /link\\\"\\n   304→    );\\n   305→    return;\\n   306→  }\\n   307→\\n   308→  // Save to database\\n   309→  db.prepare(\\n   310→    \\\"UPDATE listings SET telegram_link = ?, telegram_chat_id = ? WHERE id = ?\\\"\\n   311→  ).run(inviteLink, chatId, listingId);\\n   312→\\n   313→  // Notify all members on Bookmate\\n   314→  const members = db\\n   315→    .prepare(\\\"SELECT user_id FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ?\\\")\\n   316→    .all(listingId) as { user_id: number }[];\\n   317→\\n   318→  const bookTitle = listing.book_title as string;\\n   319→  for (const member of members) {\\n   320→    createNotification(\\n   321→      member.user_id,\\n   322→      listingId,\\n   323→      \\\"telegram_ready\\\",\\n   324→      `The Telegram group for \\\"${bookTitle}\\\" is ready! Click to view the invite link.`\\n   325→    );\\n   326→  }\\n   327→\\n   328→  // Send confirmation to the Telegram group\\n   329→  await sendMessage(\\n   330→    chatId,\\n   331→    `This group is now linked to the Bookmate reading group for \\\"<b>${bookTitle}</b>\\\".\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n   332→      `Invite link: ${inviteLink}\\\\n\\\\n` +\\n   333→      \\\"All group members have been notified on Bookmate. Happy reading!\\\"\\n   334→  );\\n   335→}\\n   336→\"}]},\"uuid\":\"3f281105-e6ef-4e22-8e8d-27ea48e64fde\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:26.421Z\",\"sourceToolAssistantUUID\":\"713abcb1-f7ac-4474-ba08-62438e6594e9\",\"userType\":\"external\",\"entrypoint\":\"sdk-cli\",\"cwd\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app\",\"sessionId\":\"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf\",\"version\":\"2.1.78\",\"gitBranch\":\"main\",\"slug\":\"crispy-sparking-shell\"}\n{\"parentUuid\":\"3f281105-e6ef-4e22-8e8d-27ea48e64fde\",\"isSidechain\":true,\"agentId\":\"af8916a0d1621f3e4\",\"message\":{\"model\":\"claude-sonnet-4-6\",\"id\":\"msg_01B9mqYkEt5oNuNzL1t8fqyg\",\"type\":\"message\",\"role\":\"assistant\",\"content\":[{\"type\":\"tool_use\",\"id\":\"toolu_01UQUwgPiTCr8Kf4MPS6dTya\",\"name\":\"Read\",\"input\":{\"file_path\":\"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/reading/route.ts\"},\"caller\":{\"type\":\"direct\"}}],\"stop_reason\":null,\"stop_sequence\":null,\"usage\":{\"input_tokens\":1,\"cache_creation_input_tokens\":7248,\"cache_read_input_tokens\":44088,\"cache_creation\":{\"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens\":7248,\"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens\":0},\"output_tokens\":18,\"service_tier\":\"standard\",\"inference_geo\":\"not_available\"}},\"requestId\":\"req_011CZGBSN3kZ35DZzAPKDt1b\",\"type\":\"assistant\",\"uuid\":\"14c37a85-fdbf-45ad-ab59-3fcd7e2344b1\",\"timestamp\":\"2026-03-21T11:54:29.432Z\",\"userType\":\"ext","stderr":"","interrupted":false,"isImage":false,"noOutputExpected":false,"persistedOutputPath":"/home/claude-beat-2026-03-19-19-40-05/.claude/projects/-root-Projects-bookmate/b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf/tool-results/bo6zaf5nv.txt","persistedOutputSize":72203}}

data: T }> {\n    37→  const data = (await response.json()) as T;\n    38→  return { status: response.status, data };\n    39→}\n    40→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf","uuid":"355a4dee-636c-4a7f-984e-1509ebee9c48","timestamp":"2026-03-21T11:56:22.287Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/helpers/mock-request.ts","content":"import { NextRequest } from \"next/server\";\n\n/**\n * Create a NextRequest for testing API routes.\n */\nexport function createTestRequest(\n  url: string,\n  options: {\n    method?: string;\n    body?: Record<string, unknown>;\n    headers?: Record<string, string>;\n  } = {}\n) {\n  const { method = \"GET\", body, headers = {} } = options;\n\n  const init: RequestInit = {\n    method,\n    headers: {\n      \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\",\n      ...headers,\n    },\n  };\n\n  if (body) {\n    init.body = JSON.stringify(body);\n  }\n\n  return new NextRequest(new URL(url, \"http://localhost:3000\"), init as NextRequest);\n}\n\n/**\n * Parse the JSON body from a NextResponse.\n */\nexport async function parseResponse<T = Record<string, unknown>>(\n  response: Response\n): Promise<{ status: number; data: T }> {\n  const data = (await response.json()) as T;\n  return { status: response.status, data };\n}\n","numLines":40,"startLine":1,"totalLines":40}}}

import(\"@/app/api/auth/login/route\");\n    51→\n    52→describe(\"POST /api/auth/login\", () => {\n    53→  beforeEach(() => {\n    54→    vi.clearAllMocks();\n    55→    mockSession.userId = FROM users\");\n    61→    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(\n    62→      \"test@example.com\", \"$2a$12$realhash\", \"Test User\"\n 125→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf","uuid":"8a4abf58-886a-44b7-831a-e687a91b4d4a","timestamp":"2026-03-21T11:56:25.655Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/auth/login.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: undefined as number | undefined,\n  email: undefined as string | undefined,\n  displayName: undefined as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n  destroy: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nconst mockBcryptCompare = vi.hoisted(() => vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(false));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  getSession: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(mockSession),\n  requireAuth: vi.fn(),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/rate-limit\", () => ({\n  checkRateLimit: vi.fn().mockReturnValue({ allowed: true, retryAfter: 0 }),\n}));\n\nvi.mock(\"bcryptjs\", () => ({\n  default: {\n    hash: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(\"$2a$12$mockedhash\"),\n    compare: mockBcryptCompare,\n  },\n}));\n\nconst { POST } = await import(\"@/app/api/auth/login/route\");\n\ndescribe(\"POST /api/auth/login\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.clearAllMocks();\n    mockSession.userId = undefined;\n    mockSession.email = undefined;\n    mockSession.displayName = undefined;\n    mockBcryptCompare.mockResolvedValue(false);\n\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n    testDb.prepare(\"INSERT INTO users (email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?)\").run(\n      \"test@example.com\", \"$2a$12$realhash\", \"Test User\"\n    );\n  });\n\n  it(\"logs in successfully with correct credentials\", async () => {\n    mockBcryptCompare.mockResolvedValue(true);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/login\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"test@example.com\", password: \"password123\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.user.email).toBe(\"test@example.com\");\n    expect(mockSession.save).toHaveBeenCalled();\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when email is missing\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/login\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { password: \"password123\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 for non-existent email\", async () => {\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/login\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"nobody@example.com\", password: \"password123\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 for wrong password\", async () => {\n    mockBcryptCompare.mockResolvedValue(false);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/login\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"test@example.com\", password: \"wrongpassword\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"handles case-insensitive email lookup\", async () => {\n    mockBcryptCompare.mockResolvedValue(true);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/auth/login\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: { email: \"TEST@EXAMPLE.COM\", password: \"password123\" },\n    });\n\n    const response = await POST(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n  });\n});\n","numLines":125,"startLine":1,"totalLines":125}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_012srvvo6TmzjoFrjgBctf9P","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function GET() {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const notifications = db\n    12→    .prepare(\n    13→      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n    14→       FROM notifications n\n    15→       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n    16→       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n    17→       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n    18→       LIMIT 50`\n    19→    )\n    20→    .all(session.userId);\n    21→\n    22→  const unreadCount = db\n    23→    .prepare(\n    24→      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    25→    )\n    26→    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n    27→\n    28→  return NextResponse.json({\n    29→    notifications,\n    30→    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n    31→  });\n    32→}\n    33→\n    34→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n    35→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    36→  if (!session) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n    38→  }\n    39→\n    40→  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n    41→\n    42→  if (notificationId) {\n    43→    db.prepare(\n    44→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    45→    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n    46→  } else {\n    47→    // Mark all as read\n    48→    db.prepare(\n    49→      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    50→    ).run(session.userId);\n    51→  }\n    52→\n    53→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    54→}\n    55→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf","uuid":"1fb5ff0a-ff9a-4920-9536-15a8979eef14","timestamp":"2026-03-21T11:56:26.149Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/notifications/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function GET() {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const notifications = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT n.*, l.book_title\n       FROM notifications n\n       LEFT JOIN listings l ON n.listing_id = l.id\n       WHERE n.user_id = ?\n       ORDER BY n.created_at DESC\n       LIMIT 50`\n    )\n    .all(session.userId);\n\n  const unreadCount = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = ? AND is_read = 0\"\n    )\n    .get(session.userId) as { count: number };\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    notifications,\n    unreadCount: unreadCount.count,\n  });\n}\n\nexport async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { notificationId } = await req.json();\n\n  if (notificationId) {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    ).run(notificationId, session.userId);\n  } else {\n    // Mark all as read\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE notifications SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = ?\"\n    ).run(session.userId);\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":55,"startLine":1,"totalLines":55}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01HMvuQqKpfaCuc7PbKWoywd","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→\n     5→export async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n     6→  const session = await requireAuth();\n     7→  if (!session) {\n     8→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n     9→  }\n    10→\n    11→  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n    12→\n    13→  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    14→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n    15→  }\n    16→\n    17→  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    18→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    19→  }\n    20→\n    21→  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    22→    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n    23→  }\n    24→\n    25→  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    26→    displayName.trim(),\n    27→    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    28→    session.userId\n    29→  );\n    30→\n    31→  // Update session\n    32→  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n    33→  await session.save();\n    34→\n    35→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n    36→}\n    37→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf","uuid":"fabe4a3a-1b70-4322-aaa8-0aff9ecc7d69","timestamp":"2026-03-21T11:56:26.434Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/profile/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n\nexport async function PATCH(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Authentication required\" }, { status: 401 });\n  }\n\n  const { displayName, bio } = await req.json();\n\n  if (!displayName || displayName.trim().length === 0) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name is required\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (displayName.length > 100) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Display name must be at most 100 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  if (bio && bio.length > 500) {\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Bio must be at most 500 characters\" }, { status: 400 });\n  }\n\n  db.prepare(\"UPDATE users SET display_name = ?, bio = ? WHERE id = ?\").run(\n    displayName.trim(),\n    (bio || \"\").trim(),\n    session.userId\n  );\n\n  // Update session\n  session.displayName = displayName.trim();\n  await session.save();\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n","numLines":37,"startLine":1,"totalLines":37}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CcpoZLbeuJP4PgmFHrvsG9","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n     2→import db from \"@/lib/db\";\n     3→import { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\n     4→import { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n     5→\n     6→/**\n     7→ * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n     8→ *\n     9→ * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n    10→ *\n    11→ * Rules:\n    12→ * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n    13→ * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n    14→ * - Cannot rate yourself\n    15→ * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n    16→ */\n    17→export async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n    18→  const session = await requireAuth();\n    19→  if (!session) {\n    20→    return NextResponse.json(\n    21→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n    22→      { status: 401 }\n    23→    );\n    24→  }\n    25→\n    26→  const body = await req.json();\n    27→  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n    28→\n    29→  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    30→    return NextResponse.json(\n    31→      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n    32→      { status: 400 }\n    33→    );\n    34→  }\n    35→\n    36→  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    37→    return NextResponse.json(\n    38→      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n    39→      { status: 400 }\n    40→    );\n    41→  }\n    42→\n    43→  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    44→    return NextResponse.json(\n    45→      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n    46→      { status: 400 }\n    47→    );\n    48→  }\n    49→\n    50→  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    51→    return NextResponse.json(\n    52→      { error: \"Comment return NextResponse.json(\n    71→      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n    72→      { status: 400 }\n    73→    );\n    74→  }\n    75→\n    76→  // Verify both users are members\n    77→  const raterMember = db\n    78→    .prepare(\n    79→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    80→    )\n    81→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n    82→\n    83→  if (!raterMember) {\n    84→    return NextResponse.json(\n    85→      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n    86→      { status: 403 }\n    87→    );\n    88→  }\n    89→\n    90→  const ratedMember = db\n    91→    .prepare(\n    92→      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    93→    )\n    94→    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n    95→\n    96→  if (!ratedMember) {\n    97→    return NextResponse.json(\n    98→      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n    99→      { status: 400 }\n   100→    );\n   101→  }\n   102→\n   103→  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n   104→  const existing = db\n   105→    .prepare(\n   106→      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n   107→    )\n   108→    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n   109→\n   110→  if (existing) {\n   111→    db.prepare(\n   112→      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n   113→    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n   114→  } else {\n   115→    db.prepare(\n   116→      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n   117→    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n   118→\n   119→    // Notify the rated user\n   120→    createNotification(\n   121→      ratedUserId,\n   122→      listingId,\n   123→      \"rating_received\",\n   124→      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n   125→    );\n   126→  }\n   127→\n   128→  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n   129→}\n   130→\n   131→/**\n   132→ * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n   133→ *\n   134→ * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n   135→ * plus the members who can still be rated.\n   136→ */\n   137→export async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n   138→  const session = await requireAuth();\n   139→  if (!session) {\n   140→    return NextResponse.json(\n   141→      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n   142→      { status: 401 }\n   143→    );\n   144→  }\n   145→\n   146→  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n   147→  if (!listingIdParam) {\n   148→    return NextResponse.json(\n   149→      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n   150→      { status: 400 }\n   151→    );\n   152→  }\n   153→  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n   154→  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n   155→    return NextResponse.json(\n   156→      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n   157→      { status: 400 }\n   158→    );\n   159→  }\n   160→\n   161→  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n   162→  const isMember = db\n   163→    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n   164→    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n   165→  if (!isMember) {\n   166→    return NextResponse.json(\n   167→      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n   168→      { status: 403 }\n   169→    );\n   170→  }\n   171→\n   172→  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n   173→  const givenRatings = db\n   174→    .prepare(\n   175→      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   176→       FROM ratings r\n   177→       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n   178→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n   179→    )\n   180→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   181→      rated_user_id: number;\n   182→      score: number;\n   183→      comment: string;\n   184→      display_name: string;\n   185→    }[];\n   186→\n   187→  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n   188→  const receivedRatings = db\n   189→    .prepare(\n   190→      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n   191→       FROM ratings r\n   192→       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n   193→       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n   194→    )\n   195→    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n   196→      rater_id: number;\n   197→      score: number;\n   198→      comment: string;\n   199→      display_name: string;\n   200→    }[];\n   201→\n   202→  return NextResponse.json({\n   203→    givenRatings,\n   204→    receivedRatings,\n   205→  });\n   206→}\n   207→"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf","uuid":"bd7b013d-e16f-4e5b-801a-a0612ed987e9","timestamp":"2026-03-21T11:56:29.441Z","tool_use_result":{"type":"text","file":{"filePath":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/app/api/ratings/route.ts","content":"import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\nimport db from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { requireAuth } from \"@/lib/session\";\nimport { createNotification } from \"@/lib/notifications\";\n\n/**\n * POST /api/ratings — Submit a rating for a group member\n *\n * Body: { listingId, ratedUserId, score (1-5), comment? }\n *\n * Rules:\n * - Both rater and rated must be members of the listing\n * - The listing must be full (group completed)\n * - Cannot rate yourself\n * - One rating per rater-rated pair per listing (can update)\n */\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const body = await req.json();\n  const { listingId, ratedUserId, score, comment } = body;\n\n  if (!listingId || !ratedUserId || !score) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId, ratedUserId, and score are required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (score < 1 || score > 5 || !Number.isInteger(score)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Score must be an integer between 1 and 5\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (ratedUserId === session.userId) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You cannot rate yourself\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (comment && comment.length > 1000) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Comment must be at most 1000 characters\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify listing exists and is full\n  const listing = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT id, book_title, is_full FROM listings WHERE id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId) as { id: number; book_title: string; is_full: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (!listing) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Listing not found\" },\n      { status: 404 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  if (!listing.is_full) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Ratings are only available for completed reading groups\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify both users are members\n  const raterMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n\n  if (!raterMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You must be a member of this group to rate\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const ratedMember = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, ratedUserId);\n\n  if (!ratedMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"The user you are rating must be a member of this group\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Upsert rating (update if exists)\n  const existing = db\n    .prepare(\n      \"SELECT id FROM ratings WHERE listing_id = ? AND rater_id = ? AND rated_user_id = ?\"\n    )\n    .get(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId) as { id: number } | undefined;\n\n  if (existing) {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"UPDATE ratings SET score = ?, comment = ?, created_at = datetime('now') WHERE id = ?\"\n    ).run(score, comment || \"\", existing.id);\n  } else {\n    db.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO ratings (listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id, score, comment) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(listingId, session.userId, ratedUserId, score, comment || \"\");\n\n    // Notify the rated user\n    createNotification(\n      ratedUserId,\n      listingId,\n      \"rating_received\",\n      `Someone rated your participation in \"${listing.book_title}\"`\n    );\n  }\n\n  return NextResponse.json({ ok: true });\n}\n\n/**\n * GET /api/ratings?listingId=X — Get ratings for a listing\n *\n * Returns ratings the current user has given and received in a listing,\n * plus the members who can still be rated.\n */\nexport async function GET(req: NextRequest) {\n  const session = await requireAuth();\n  if (!session) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Authentication required\" },\n      { status: 401 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  const listingIdParam = req.nextUrl.searchParams.get(\"listingId\");\n  if (!listingIdParam) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"listingId parameter required\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n  const listingId = parseInt(listingIdParam, 10);\n  if (isNaN(listingId)) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Invalid listingId\" },\n      { status: 400 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Verify the current user is a member of this listing\n  const isMember = db\n    .prepare(\"SELECT 1 FROM listing_members WHERE listing_id = ? AND user_id = ?\")\n    .get(listingId, session.userId);\n  if (!isMember) {\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"You are not a member of this group\" },\n      { status: 403 }\n    );\n  }\n\n  // Ratings the current user has given in this listing\n  const givenRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rated_user_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rated_user_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rater_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rated_user_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  // Ratings the current user has received in this listing\n  const receivedRatings = db\n    .prepare(\n      `SELECT r.rater_id, r.score, r.comment, u.display_name\n       FROM ratings r\n       JOIN users u ON r.rater_id = u.id\n       WHERE r.listing_id = ? AND r.rated_user_id = ?`\n    )\n    .all(listingId, session.userId) as {\n      rater_id: number;\n      score: number;\n      comment: string;\n      display_name: string;\n    }[];\n\n  return NextResponse.json({\n    givenRatings,\n    receivedRatings,\n  });\n}\n","numLines":207,"startLine":1,"totalLines":207}}}

{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_013R9tcJqffpL34PftrLcL7A","type":"tool_result","content":"     1→import Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\n     2→import path from \"path\";\n     3→import fs from \"fs\";\n     4→\n     5→const DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\n     6→const DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n     7→\n     8→// Ensure data directory exists\n     9→if (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n    10→  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n    11→}\n    12→\n    13→const db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n    14→\n    15→// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\n    16→db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n    17→db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n    18→\n    19→// Initialize schema\n    20→db.exec(`\n    21→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    22→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    23→    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    24→    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    25→    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    26→    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    27→    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    28→  );\n    29→\n    30→  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    31→    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    32→    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    33→    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    34→    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    35→    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    36→    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    37→    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    38→    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    39→    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    40→    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    41→    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    42→    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n Database from \"better-sqlite3\";\nimport path from \"path\";\nimport fs from \"fs\";\n\nconst DB_DIR = process.env.DB_DIR || path.join(process.cwd(), \"data\");\nconst DB_PATH = path.join(DB_DIR, \"bookmate.db\");\n\n// Ensure data directory exists\nif (!fs.existsSync(DB_DIR)) {\n  fs.mkdirSync(DB_DIR, { recursive: true });\n}\n\nconst db = new Database(DB_PATH);\n\n// Enable WAL mode for better concurrent performance\ndb.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\ndb.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n\n// Initialize schema\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n    password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n    display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n    bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n    book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n    reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n    start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n    meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n    max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n    telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_members (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    joined_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id, user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS user_genres (\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    genre TEXT NOT NULL,\n    PRIMARY KEY (user_id, genre),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    listing_id INTEGER,\n    type TEXT NOT NULL,\n    message TEXT NOT NULL,\n    is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listing_applications (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending'\n      CHECK(status IN ('pending', 'approved', 'rejected')),\n    message TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    applied_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    decided_at TEXT,\n    UNIQUE(listing_id, user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Idempotent migration: add requires_approval column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN requires_approval INTEGER DEFAULT 0\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add platform_preference column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN platform_preference TEXT DEFAULT 'telegram'\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add discord_link column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_link TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add discord_channel_id column\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN discord_channel_id TEXT DEFAULT ''\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Idempotent migration: add telegram_chat_id column for auto-telegram feature\ntry {\n  db.exec(\"ALTER TABLE listings ADD COLUMN telegram_chat_id INTEGER\");\n} catch {\n  // Column already exists — safe to ignore\n}\n\n// Tables for Telegram bot integration\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS pending_telegram_groups (\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    telegram_chat_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (listing_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_chats (\n    chat_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,\n    chat_title TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n  );\n\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS telegram_user_links (\n    user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    telegram_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    PRIMARY KEY (user_id),\n    UNIQUE (telegram_user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Rating and Reputation system\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ratings (\n    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n    listing_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rater_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    rated_user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    score INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(score >= 1 AND score <= 5),\n    comment TEXT DEFAULT '',\n    created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n    UNIQUE(listing_id, rater_id, rated_user_id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rater_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n    FOREIGN KEY (rated_user_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n  );\n`);\n\n// Performance indexes on high-frequency foreign key columns\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_members_user_id ON listing_members(user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_id ON notifications(user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ratings_rated_user_id ON ratings(rated_user_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listings_author_id ON listings(author_id);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_listing_applications_listing_status ON listing_applications(listing_id, status);\n  CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_notifications_user_unread ON notifications(user_id, is_read);\n`);\n\nexport default db;\n","numLines":180,"startLine":1,"totalLines":180}}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_01CaezsMqmLVrDsth6Dz1WtC","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_01BdFpxGoWNhRcF8fq4pWpNA","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/notifications/notifications.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS listings (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      author_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      book_title TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_author TEXT NOT NULL,\n      book_cover_url TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      book_olid TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      language TEXT DEFAULT 'English',\n      reading_pace TEXT NOT NULL,\n      start_date TEXT NOT NULL,\n      meeting_format TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(meeting_format IN ('voice', 'text', 'mixed')),\n      max_group_size INTEGER NOT NULL CHECK(max_group_size >= 2 AND max_group_size <= 20),\n      telegram_link TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      is_full INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (author_id) REFERENCES users(id)\n    );\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      user_id INTEGER NOT NULL,\n      listing_id INTEGER,\n      type TEXT NOT NULL,\n      message TEXT NOT NULL,\n      is_read INTEGER DEFAULT 0,\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now')),\n      FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id),\n      FOREIGN KEY (listing_id) REFERENCES listings(id)\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockRequireAuth = vi.hoisted(() => vi.fn());\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  requireAuth: mockRequireAuth,\n}));\n\nconst { GET, PATCH } = await import(\"@/app/api/notifications/route\");\n\ndescribe(\"GET /api/notifications\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.clearAllMocks();\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, \"user@test.com\", \"hash\", \"Test User\");\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listings (id, author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, \"Test Book\", \"Test Author\", \"1 chapter/week\", \"2026-04-01\", \"text\", 4);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    const response = await GET();\n    expect(response.status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns empty notifications for new user\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue({ userId: 1 });\n    const response = await GET();\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.notifications).toEqual([]);\n    expect(data.unreadCount).toBe(0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns notifications with unread count\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue({ userId: 1 });\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message, is_read) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, \"member_joined\", \"Someone joined your group\", 0);\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message, is_read) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, \"group_full\", \"Your group is now full\", 1);\n\n    const response = await GET();\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.notifications).toHaveLength(2);\n    expect(data.unreadCount).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"includes book_title from listing join\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue({ userId: 1 });\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, listing_id, type, message) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, \"member_joined\", \"Someone joined\");\n\n    const response = await GET();\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.notifications[0].book_title).toBe(\"Test Book\");\n  });\n});\n\ndescribe(\"PATCH /api/notifications\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.clearAllMocks();\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM notifications\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM listings\");\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, \"user@test.com\", \"hash\", \"Test User\");\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO listings (id, author_id, book_title, book_author, reading_pace, start_date, meeting_format, max_group_size) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, \"Test Book\", \"Test Author\", \"1 chapter/week\", \"2026-04-01\", \"text\", 4);\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO notifications (id, user_id, listing_id, type, message, is_read) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, 1, \"member_joined\", \"Someone joined\", 0);\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO notifications (id, user_id, listing_id, type, message, is_read) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(2, 1, 1, \"group_full\", \"Group is full\", 0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/notifications\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { notificationId: 1 },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"marks a single notification as read\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue({ userId: 1 });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/notifications\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { notificationId: 1 },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.ok).toBe(true);\n\n    // Verify only one was marked as read\n    const unread = testDb.prepare(\n      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = 1 AND is_read = 0\"\n    ).get() as { count: number };\n    expect(unread.count).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"marks all notifications as read when no notificationId\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue({ userId: 1 });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/notifications\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: {},\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const unread = testDb.prepare(\n      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = 1 AND is_read = 0\"\n    ).get() as { count: number };\n    expect(unread.count).toBe(0);\n  });\n});\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":139,"cache_read_input_tokens":67989,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":139},"output_tokens":25,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf","uuid":"ffdb6630-7a50-4de5-b119-4d795b4ccc15"}

?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, \"Test Book\", \"Test Author\", \"1 chapter/week\", \"2026-04-01\", \"text\", 4);\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO notifications (id, user_id, listing_id, type, message, is_read) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, 1, 1, \"member_joined\", \"Someone joined\", 0);\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO notifications (id, user_id, listing_id, type, message, is_read) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(2, 1, 1, \"group_full\", \"Group is full\", 0);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/notifications\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { notificationId: 1 },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"marks a single notification as read\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue({ userId: 1 });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/notifications\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { notificationId: 1 },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.ok).toBe(true);\n\n    // Verify only one was marked as read\n    const unread = testDb.prepare(\n      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = 1 AND is_read = 0\"\n    ).get() as { count: number };\n    expect(unread.count).toBe(1);\n  });\n\n  it(\"marks all notifications as read when no notificationId\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue({ userId: 1 });\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/notifications\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: {},\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const unread = testDb.prepare(\n      \"SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM notifications WHERE user_id = 1 AND is_read = 0\"\n    ).get() as { count: number };\n    expect(unread.count).toBe(0);\n  });\n});\n","structuredPatch":[],"originalFile":null}}

{"type":"assistant","message":{"model":"claude-opus-4-6","id":"msg_011v5y6X7iQAHdsqR8HjvAzh","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"tool_use","id":"toolu_012tH6hqwK1Ewcqi3GaYv721","name":"Write","input":{"file_path":"/root/Projects/bookmate/app/__tests__/api/profile/profile.test.ts","content":"import { describe, it, expect, vi, beforeEach } from \"vitest\";\nimport { createTestRequest } from \"../../helpers/mock-request\";\n\nconst testDb = vi.hoisted(() => {\n  const Db = require(\"better-sqlite3\");\n  const db = new Db(\":memory:\");\n  db.pragma(\"journal_mode = WAL\");\n  db.pragma(\"foreign_keys = ON\");\n  db.exec(`\n    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (\n      id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,\n      email TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL,\n      password_hash TEXT NOT NULL,\n      display_name TEXT NOT NULL,\n      bio TEXT DEFAULT '',\n      created_at TEXT DEFAULT (datetime('now'))\n    );\n  `);\n  return db;\n});\n\nconst mockSession = vi.hoisted(() => ({\n  userId: 1 as number | undefined,\n  displayName: \"Test User\" as string | undefined,\n  save: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(undefined),\n}));\n\nconst mockRequireAuth = vi.hoisted(() => vi.fn());\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/db\", () => ({ default: testDb }));\n\nvi.mock(\"@/lib/session\", () => ({\n  requireAuth: mockRequireAuth,\n}));\n\nconst { PATCH } = await import(\"@/app/api/profile/route\");\n\ndescribe(\"PATCH /api/profile\", () => {\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    vi.clearAllMocks();\n    testDb.exec(\"DELETE FROM users\");\n\n    testDb.prepare(\n      \"INSERT INTO users (id, email, password_hash, display_name, bio) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)\"\n    ).run(1, \"user@test.com\", \"hash\", \"Test User\", \"Old bio\");\n\n    mockSession.userId = 1;\n    mockSession.displayName = \"Test User\";\n    mockSession.save.mockResolvedValue(undefined);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 401 when not authenticated\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(null);\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/profile\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { displayName: \"New Name\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(401);\n  });\n\n  it(\"updates display name and bio\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(mockSession);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/profile\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { displayName: \"New Name\", bio: \"New bio\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n    const data = await response.json();\n    expect(data.ok).toBe(true);\n\n    const user = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT display_name, bio FROM users WHERE id = 1\").get() as { display_name: string; bio: string };\n    expect(user.display_name).toBe(\"New Name\");\n    expect(user.bio).toBe(\"New bio\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when display name is empty\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(mockSession);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/profile\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { displayName: \"\", bio: \"Some bio\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when display name is too long\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(mockSession);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/profile\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { displayName: \"x\".repeat(101), bio: \"Some bio\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"returns 400 when bio is too long\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(mockSession);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/profile\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { displayName: \"Valid Name\", bio: \"x\".repeat(501) },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(400);\n  });\n\n  it(\"trims whitespace from display name\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(mockSession);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/profile\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { displayName: \"  Trimmed Name  \", bio: \"\" },\n    });\n    const response = await PATCH(req);\n    expect(response.status).toBe(200);\n\n    const user = testDb.prepare(\"SELECT display_name FROM users WHERE id = 1\").get() as { display_name: string };\n    expect(user.display_name).toBe(\"Trimmed Name\");\n  });\n\n  it(\"updates session displayName after save\", async () => {\n    mockRequireAuth.mockResolvedValue(mockSession);\n\n    const req = createTestRequest(\"/api/profile\", {\n      method: \"PATCH\",\n      body: { displayName: \"Updated Name\", bio: \"\" },\n    });\n    await PATCH(req);\n    expect(mockSession.displayName).toBe(\"Updated Name\");\n    expect(mockSession.save).toHaveBeenCalled();\n  });\n});\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":2257,"cache_read_input_tokens":68128,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":2257},"output_tokens":24,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"b216bb0e-4934-43a0-8f7a-14f7ea4271cf","uuid":"088af4be-9abc-45a5-9ba0-cd4cde4cc091"}
